title: Lootr Polymer Patch
description: A 100% serverside fabric patch for Lootr, adding per-player loot chests.
body:
## Lootr Polymer Patch
[Lootr](https://modrinth.com/mod/lootr) is a mod that makes all containers inside structures spawn with per-player loot so that every player can loot structures without having a large perimeter around spawn devoid of loot.

This mod patches Lootr to work completely server-side. That is, vanilla clients can join and use the mod. This mod must be installed alongside Lootr and its dependencies.

Lootr containers render as their vanilla counterparts, with a small lodestone icon.

![A naturally generated chest in a ruined portal.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36e0230f72cb55e2caf231f47b550a34a2e25579_0.webp)
> A naturally generated chest in a ruined portal.

This mod also removes Lootr's advancements, making it an ideal-drop in for SMPs since they're just irritating for players and add bloat to what should be a simple server-side mod.

This mod probably works without too many changes on lower versions but you'll need to downgrade the included dependencies and rebuild it.
